overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game (Watch Dogs: Legion) showing a character in a leather jacket walking through a wet London street at night. The character navigates past a protest encampment, crosses roads, and traverses urban intersections with historic architecture and autumn trees.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet sidewalk past a protest camp with tents and banners

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: large stone building with steps and arched doorway
canvas tent with orange lighting underneath
white protest banner with black text hanging on building
vertical banner with gold Albion logo on street pole

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a wet sidewalk next to a historic stone building with a protest encampment. A 'RENTS NOT TENTS' banner hangs prominently on the right while street lamps illuminate the autumn night scene.

scene_state.functional_zone: street crossing with historic red telephone booth

events.description: approaching iconic red telephone booth at street corner
crossing the wet street while avoiding parked vehicles

agents.ego_description: navigating around the red phone booth and crossing the street to the other side

notable_agents.action: white car driving past on the wet road

entered.detail: classic British red telephone box on the sidewalk
zebra crossing markings on the wet asphalt

segments.scene_description: The character passes a classic red telephone booth and crosses the wet street. Vehicles drive past on the left as the character moves from the enclosed sidewalk to the open road crossing.

scene_state.functional_zone: tree-lined urban sidewalk with parked cars

events.description: slight turn to follow the curve of the sidewalk lined with autumn trees

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk passing pedestrians and parked vehicles under street lamps

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking in opposite direction wearing light-colored jacket

entered.detail: deciduous trees with yellow autumn leaves lining the street
black public waste bins on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a tree-lined sidewalk with autumn foliage. Parked cars line the left side while pedestrians walk in both directions under the glow of street lamps.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy urban intersection with traffic lights

events.description: waiting at intersection corner for white van and traffic to clear
beginning to cross the intersection with a group of pedestrians

agents.ego_description: waiting at the corner then crossing the busy intersection with other pedestrians while vehicles pass by

notable_agents.action: large white delivery van driving through the intersection

entered.detail: marked pedestrian crossing at busy intersection
black pole with traffic signal and pedestrian button
striped stone building with blue signage at corner

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a busy intersection, waits for a white van to pass, then crosses the street with a group of pedestrians. Historic buildings with bright storefront signs surround the crosswalk area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-slicked London street that transitions from a quiet protest encampment to a bustling urban intersection. It begins on a wet sidewalk beside a historic stone building where a RENTS NOT TENTS banner hangs under the glow of street lamps. As the character moves forward, the scene opens up from the enclosed sidewalk to the open road, passing a classic red telephone booth while vehicles drive by on the left. The camera then follows the character along a tree-lined path filled with autumn foliage and parked cars, weaving through pedestrians under the night lights. Finally, the environment shifts toward a bright, commercial hub as the character waits for a white van to pass before crossing a busy intersection surrounded by historic buildings and glowing storefront signs.
